strengths: Strong Python + SQL + cloud data stack experience
Proven quantified business impact (300% revenue lift)
Experience building production ETL and CI/CD pipelines
Visualization and reporting skills (Tableau, Power BI)
Solid data governance and automation practices
weaknesses: Limited explicit ML model production experience
Under 4-5+ years labeled as data scientist (experience ~2-3 years)
Less direct retail analytics / demand planning experience
Few mentions of advanced statistical techniques (regression)
improvement_bullets: Developed and deployed machine learning models to identify high-value customer segments, utilizing regression and classification techniques to forecast churn and drive targeted marketing campaigns.
Applied statistical regression analysis to evaluate marketing campaign performance, identifying key drivers of customer engagement and optimizing marketing spend for retail performance.
Built and maintained end-to-end data pipelines in Snowflake, focusing on data modeling to support Demand Planning and inventory strategy for complex retail datasets.
Engineered predictive models using Python (Scikit-Learn/Pandas) to support Demand Planning and CRM initiatives, directly contributing to data-driven business strategy.
Conducted rigorous experimentation and A/B testing on retail consumer behaviors, utilizing advanced statistical modeling to provide actionable insights for business stakeholders.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Scientist opportunity with David Yurman. I am interested in this opportunity because of the brand's unique intersection of artistic heritage and modern innovation, and I am eager to help the Data Management, Engineering, and Analytics team scale its impact as it enters this exciting phase of growth. What interests me about working for David Yurman is its dedication to craftsmanship and its position as a preeminent American luxury brand, which inspires me to apply high-level analytical precision to your sophisticated retail operations. I believe my experience in building scalable data pipelines and my ability to translate complex statistical findings into business strategy would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data-driven automation to solve high-stakes business challenges. In fact, at Shine Masters, I developed a statistical model to identify high-value customer segments and automated reporting pipelines using Python and Power BI. This initiative provided the single source of truth needed for strategic decision-making, which contributed to a 300% increase in revenue within the targeted segment over 12 months. Ultimately, I know that the Data Scientist role at David Yurman would allow me to bring my expertise in data modeling to inform Demand Planning and CRM strategies. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my regression and experimentation skills. I designed and executed A/B tests for digital marketing campaigns, utilizing statistical rigor to measure audience lift and provide the evidence needed to optimize marketing spend. This experience in experimental design directly aligns with the essential duties required to refine AI/ML models at David Yurman. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python, SQL, and Snowflake in working on data-driven business optimization at David Yurman. I know that my technical proficiency and my commitment to data governance align with what it takes to succeed in the Data Scientist role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
